name: Basic Free Dressing - Vegetarian Cooking For
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the vinegar, water, mustard, and black pepper.
2. Stir in the celery and dill seeds until well mixed.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
4. Store any unused dressing in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to one week.
